title: Lumen Session — 2026-03-13 (v0.2 Suggestion Engine)
content:
# Lumen — Session Digest 2026-03-13

## v0.2 Steps Completed Today

### Step 0: ADR-017 Override
- ADR-017 (hybrid debounced auto-trigger) overridden by Cole — manual-only default confirmed
- ADR-017a written replacing hybrid trigger approach
- Rationale: auto-triggering burns API credits without GM opt-in, debounce timing values are untested guesses

### Step 1: Settings Panel
- API key storage via Electron safeStorage (ADR-016), env var fallback
- Trigger config: manual / timer / N-segments radio group (ADR-017a)
- Model preferences: default claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (Anthropic), gpt-4o (OpenAI)
- Display, audio, and session preferences with persistence
- SettingsPanel.svelte slide-in panel with all preference sections

### Step 2: Suggestion Engine
- SuggestionEngine class in src/pipeline/suggestion_engine.py
- 4 suggestion types per ADR-015a: rules_check, suggestion, npc_reaction, recap
- Compendium relay wired: pipeline → foundry-server.js → lumen.mjs → Foundry game.packs → back
- Wired into transcription_server.py: transcript feed, Foundry delta feed, trigger routing
- Both Anthropic and OpenAI SDK support (async clients, lazy-initialized)
- Backpressure: discard triggers when 5 pending, scene buffer clears on scene change

### Step 3: Suggestion Queue UI + Pipeline Spawn
- pipeline-manager.js: spawns Python with API keys injected via env vars, auto-restart (max 3), tree-kill on Windows
- suggestion-store.js: in-memory Map, triage actions (use/defer/reject), JSONL session log
- Tabbed sidebar: Players / Suggestions tabs with yellow badge count
- SuggestionPanel.svelte: type-specific card rendering, selectable options for suggestion type, triage buttons, note input
- SessionControls: lightbulb "Suggest" button, Ctrl+Shift+G shortcut
- StatusBar: pipeline process state indicator (starting/running/crashed/failed/stopped)
- preload.js: full IPC bridge for pipeline lifecycle + suggestion events + triage actions

## Product Decisions Made

- **Suggestion categories redefined (ADR-015a):** rules_check, suggestion, npc_reaction, recap. Passive monitoring deferred to v0.3.
- **Triage model:** Use / Defer / Reject with optional note. No clipboard copy — GMs put their own spin on suggestions. Triaged decisions logged to JSONL for session review and engine tuning.
- **Suggestion type returns 2-3 options** per call (single API call).
- **Haiku as default model** — fast, cheap, appropriate for session latency. GM can upgrade to Sonnet in settings if quality is insufficient.
- **Encounter difficulty advisor explicitly excluded** — GMs tune their own combats.

## Roadmap Expanded

New milestones added through v1.3:
- v0.3: NPC voice/tone profiles, initiative helper, session notes in Foundry
- v0.8: Session pacing tools, scene timer
- v0.9: Session prep mode
- v1.1: Voice commands
- v1.2: Table-aware suggestion tuning
- v1.3: Inter-session prep report

plan.md updated to reflect full expanded roadmap.

## Up Next

**Step 4 — Integration testing** (manual, Cole runs at home):
- 10-test checklist covering pipeline spawn, Foundry connection, all 4 suggestion types, triage actions, backpressure, crash recovery, clean shutdown
- Results logged to projects/Lumen/benchmarks/v02_integration.md

## Notes

- Remote session — Cole was at the beach (30mph winds, sand in eyes, car refuge). Productive despite the conditions.
- plan.md updated and ready for two-AI review loop before vault commit.


---
**2026-03-16T00:37:28.099089-07:00 | Created via Engram**
